title: Engineers Worked With
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS crafts FROM EngineerCraft WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Engineer AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM EngineerCraft WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Engineer ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {crafts} engineering session(s) across all workshops during the report period. Each engineer is a unique character with their own unlock story — the visit distribution reveals your specialist focus and how far along the engineering tree you've progressed.
details.help: EngineerCraft Engineer field names the workshop where the craft happened. crafts is the total crafting volume driving the title.

tagLines: Engineer workshop visit log compiled. Blueprint application counts per engineer noted in the record.
Some engineers you visit once. Others become permanent stops on your circuit. This shows which are which.
Every engineer relationship started with an unlock quest. Some turned into a career-long working arrangement.
